title: Rich Polish Avocado Tagine
description: A savory and dense Polish dish featuring avocado hass pulp, this recipe is a quick fix for a weeknight dinner. It is a raw friendly dish cooked in a clay pot.
instructions: Preheat the clay pot over medium heat.
Add olive oil to the clay pot and saute the chopped onion until softened.
Add minced garlic to the clay pot and cook for 1 minute.
Add mashed avocado pulp to the clay pot and stir well.
Add paprika, salt, and black pepper to the clay pot and stir well.
Pour chicken broth into the clay pot and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low and simmer for 10 minutes.
Serve the tagine hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
